title: poa kirkii
intro: Poa kirkii, also known as Kirk's grass or mountain grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Poa kirkii is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical remedy, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal preparations.
